videoSnippet.title: The Ultimate Fighter || Akiba Rubinstein vs Oldřich Duras || San Sebastian (1911)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Akiba Rubinstein vs Oldrich Duras
San Sebastian (1911), San Sebastian ESP, rd 9, Mar-06
Queen's Gambit Declined: Capablanca - General (D30)

1.d4 d5 2.Nf3 Nf6 3.c4 e6 4.Bg5 h6 5.Bh4 dxc4 6.e3 b5 7.a4 c6 8.Be2
Bb4+ 9.Nfd2 Bb7 10.O-O a6 11.Bxf6 gxf6 12.b3 cxb3 13.Qxb3 Be7 14.Nc3 Nd7 15.Bf3 Qb6 16.Rfe1 O-O 17.Rab1 Rab8 18.Ne2 f5 19.Nf4 Kg7 20.Qc3 b4 21.Qb2 Kh7 22.Nc4 Qc7 23.Qc2 Rg8 24.a5 c5 25.d5 Ne5 26.Nxe5 Qxe5 27.Red1 Rbc8 28.Qc4 Qf6 29.g3 e5 30.Ne2 e4 31.Bg2 Bd6 32.Rf1 Qg5 33.Rbd1 h5 34.f3 exf3 35.Rxf3 Rce8 36.Rdf1 Bc8 37.Bh3 Re5 38.Kh1
Kh8 39.Qc2 Bb7 40.Rxf5 Bxd5+ 41.Bg2 Bxg2+ 42.Kxg2 Qxe3 43.Rxe5 Qxe5 44.Rf5 b3 45.Qd3 Qe6 46.Rxh5+ Kg7 47.Rg5+ Kf8 48.Nf4 Qf6 49.Rf5 Qe7 50.Qd5 Bxf4 51.Rxf4 Rh8 52.Re4 Qf6 53.Qxc5+ Kg7 54.Rg4+ Kh6 55.Rf4 Qb2+ 56.Rf2 Qg7 57.Qe3+ Kh7 58.Qxb3 Rf8 59.Rf5 Qg6 60.Qd5 f6 61.Qe6 Kg7 62.h4 Rb8 63.h5 Rb2+ 64.Kh3 Re2 65.Qxe2 Qxf5+ 66.Qg4+ Qxg4+ 67.Kxg4 Kh6 68.Kh4 f5 69.g4 fxg4 70.Kxg4 Kg7 71.Kg5 Kh7 72.Kf6
